title: Scroll button click open in new tab
excerpt:
Hi, I think it could be a very very useful shortcut that when you click with the scroll button, you open the link in a new tab, like every other place on the web. 
That’s all :wink:

posts.author: RomainD (Darson)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: jmc1 (Jung)
posts.cookedHtml: This is such great a quality of life feature. I also wanted to expand this feature request with command+click on mac and ctrl+click on windows.
